title: CRISPR Therapeutics Provides Business Update and Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Financial Results
text: CRISPR Therapeutics FY2024 Business Update and Full-Year Results. Fourth Quarter 2024 Financial Results: The company reported Q4 2024 revenues of $35.7 million, exceeding consensus estimates of $10 million, demonstrating strong collaboration revenues and early CASGEVY sales recognition. Full Year 2024 Results: Annual revenues of $37.3 million were significantly down from $371.2 million in 2023, primarily due to the absence of large Vertex milestone payments which were received in 2023 for CASGEVY regulatory approvals. Net loss for 2024 widened to $4.34 per share compared to $1.94 per share in 2023, reflecting the company's continued investment in pipeline programs. 2025 Outlook Highlights: Management provided guidance for 2025, highlighting expectations for CASGEVY revenue acceleration, continued clinical progress across pipeline programs, and anticipated regulatory interactions for multiple programs. Multiple Catalysts Expected: The company outlined several anticipated milestones for 2025-2026, including CASGEVY label expansion opportunities, CAR-T and in vivo program clinical data, and potential regulatory alignments. Cash Position: The company maintained a strong cash position of $1.9 billion as of December 31, 2024, providing sufficient runway for all planned clinical and commercial activities. Strategic Initiatives: Management emphasized the importance of driving CASGEVY adoption in established markets while simultaneously advancing a diversified clinical pipeline to support long-term growth.
